'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=88C9gdLWlwZV7wTAGrOz0bZaJwAFUfNxgUjpw68Y1dk-1774415907-1.0.1.1-sbJsHiuuZrnlfHbKr0Pqe4NDRi1wIftEUSNFk9Fu.zk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
